cues.label: A valid heap
cues.headline: Parent ≤ children
cues.narration: Every parent is at most its children, so the minimum sits at the root.

cues.label: Push at the end
cues.headline: New value at the next leaf
cues.narration: Insert drops the new value at the end of the array to keep the shape gap-free.

cues.label: Sift up
cues.headline: Swap while smaller than parent
cues.narration: Compare with the parent and swap upward until it fits or reaches the root.

cues.label: Pop the root
cues.headline: Last element takes the throne
cues.narration: Remove the root as the answer, move the last value to the root, and sift it down.

cues.label: Sift down
cues.headline: Swap with the smaller child
cues.narration: Swap with the smaller child until the parent-≤-children promise holds again.

cues.label: Why log n
cues.headline: One path, not the whole tree
cues.narration: Each repair walks a single root-to-leaf path of length about log n.
